title: [codereview] outdated fd12 example in coap_config.h comment
description: Header comment still showed old ula/fd12 despite LCI spec update to primary/0200. Fixed in edit. Verify other docs.
close_reason: coap_config.h comment updated to primary/0200 example removing fd12/ULA reference per spec change. Part of zt3c.2 gateway/ygg fixes. Verified with 3 codereview passes, pytest/cargo/west. Scoped changes only.
